features.title: Eight Provisions, One Daily Bread
features.subtitle: Manna is built to support every system of the body — not a single supplement, but a complete framework for whole-person stewardship

brain.title: Brain & Nervous System
brain.description: Astaxanthin shields neurons from oxidative damage. DHA builds the membranes of thought. Mucuna supports dopamine pathways for mood, motion, and clarity.

gut.title: Gut & Microbiome
gut.description: Fiber, polyphenols, and fermented food precursors feed the beneficial bacteria. The gut-brain axis becomes a path of nourishment, not inflammation.

energy.title: Energy & Mitochondria
energy.description: Creatine, CoQ10, and B-vitamin cofactors sustain cellular energy. The brain uses 20% of your body's power — Manna ensures the engines have fuel.

longevity.title: Longevity & Cellular Health
longevity.description: Polyphenols activate Nrf2 — the master switch for your body's own antioxidant defenses. Whole foods, no sugar, designed to honor the body's design.

howItWorks.title: The Stewardship Path
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to begin the journey

step1.title: Take the Stewardship Assessment
step1.description: Share your health journey with our AI guide. Ten questions reveal where your body most needs the eight provisions Manna offers.

step2.title: Receive Your Personalized Path
step2.description: AI-personalized analysis connects your unique concerns to the science of cellular stewardship. Understand what your body has been asking for.

step3.title: Join the Founding Tribe
step3.description: Be gathered into the tribe before the bar launches. Receive weekly stewardship teaching, founding-price access, and the first allocation of Manna.

manifesto.title: What We Believe
manifesto.body: We believe the body was wisely made — not to be conquered with chemistry, but stewarded with intention. That the most powerful medicine grows quietly in creation, hidden in plain sight, ready to be gathered by those willing to seek it. That nourishment is provision — not a transaction, but a gift received with gratitude. And that to overcome disease, decline, and the slow surrender to convenience, we must return to the rhythm of daily bread.

provisions.title: The Eight Provisions of Manna
provisions.subtitle: Each bar carries the architecture your body was designed to receive

shield.name: The Shield
shield.description: Astaxanthin from wild algae. Crosses the blood-brain barrier to protect neurons from oxidative attack.

fuel.name: The Fuel
fuel.description: Creatine, taurine, and CoQ10 — sustained cellular energy for a brain that uses 20% of the body's power.

foundation.name: The Foundation
foundation.description: Algae-derived DHA, walnuts, and pumpkin seeds — the brain-essential fats that build neuron membranes.

awakening.name: The Awakening
awakening.description: Cacao, turmeric, and cinnamon — flipping the cellular switches that activate the body's own defenses.

restoration.name: The Restoration
restoration.description: Mucuna pruriens, glycine, and B-complex — supporting the dopamine pathways that govern mood and motion.

garden.name: The Garden
garden.description: Wild berries, lion's mane, and polyphenols — feeding the gut-brain connection at its source.

rhythm.name: The Rhythm
rhythm.description: Low-glycemic, complete-protein architecture that respects fasting windows and metabolic flexibility.

witness.name: The Witness
witness.description: Whole foods only. No sugar. No seed oils. No artificial anything. Sealed in gold — set apart for those who overcome.

starter.name: First Provision
features: Your microbiome and cellular health score

standard.name: The Reset
features: Cooking oils guide for cellular health

first.title: First Portion

founders.title: Founders' Price
founders.description: A meaningful discount, locked in for life. Honor for those who came early.

gift.title: The Gift

teaching.title: The Teaching
teaching.description: Weekly stewardship letters — the science and scripture behind whole-person health, in English and Spanish.

form.title: Be gathered into the tribe

quiz.title: Your Stewardship Assessment
quiz.subtitle: Discover where your body most needs Manna's provisions
quiz.reportIncludes: Your path includes a specific action plan based on Manna's eight provisions

goal.question: What's your #1 health goal right now?

diet.question: How would you describe your current diet?

sugar.question: How often do you consume sugary foods or drinks?

fiber.question: How many servings of vegetables do you eat daily?

fermented.question: Do you eat fermented foods (yogurt, kimchi, sauerkraut)?

bloating.question: How often do you experience bloating or digestive discomfort?

sleep.question: How many hours of sleep do you typically get?

antibiotics.question: Have you taken antibiotics in the past year?

meals.question: How many meals do you typically eat per day?

results.title: Your Stewardship

goal.title: Your Goal:
goal.connection: Your body's stewardship plays a crucial role in {{goal}}. Based on your responses, Manna's framework can support your specific path to restoration.

unlock.title: Unlock Your Full Path
unlock.subtitle: Choose the path that fits your journey

resetProtocol.title: 14-Day Stewardship Reset
resetProtocol.removeList: Added sugars, refined carbs (bread, pasta, rice), seed oils (canola, soybean, corn)
resetProtocol.cookingTip: Never heat olive/avocado oil. Use only coconut oil or ghee for cooking.
resetProtocol.focusList: Non-starchy vegetables, quality proteins, healthy fats, berries, bone broth, fermented foods

fasting.title: Lifetime Fasting Protocol
fasting.betweenMeals: Between meals: No solid food, no sugar/carbs, no snacking. Water only.
fasting.habit: Once habit (2-3 weeks), maintain results for life.

upsell.title: Unlock the Lifetime Fasting Protocol
upsell.description: Upgrade to The Inheritance for our powerful 2-meal intermittent fasting protocol — the rhythm that aligns with how your body was designed to function.

tribeOffer.title: Join the Founding Tribe
tribeOffer.description: Be the first to receive the Manna Nutritional Bar when it launches. Founders' price locked in for life.

results.disclaimer: This report provides educational information and lifestyle guidance grounded in current science and biblical stewardship principles. It does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Consult a healthcare professional before making changes.
